description: Pairwise relatedness coefficients (theta, IBS0/1/2, KING) from a BEAGLE genotype-likelihood file restricted to a sites file. Per-pair scores for all N×(N-1)/2 sample pairs.
intended_use: kinship QC, family detection, pedigree input
label: ngsRelate — pairwise relatedness from genotype likelihoods

description: Builds the most-likely pedigree (trios / sib groups) from a pairwise-relatedness matrix produced by ngsRelate.
intended_use: trio / family discovery from a kinship matrix; required upstream for Mendelian QC
label: ngsPedigree — pedigree reconstruction from a relatedness matrix

description: Per-trio Mendelian-error rate along the genome. Inputs: pedigree (trios) + BEAGLE genotype likelihoods + sites file. Score is per-trio per-interval.
intended_use: trio QC, sites filtering, sequencing-error model
label: Mendelian inheritance — per-trio error rate

description: Window-wise population-genetic statistics between groups defined on a sample set. Wraps region_popstats's groupwise mode; emits a composite popstats_result that downstream readers split into per-metric layers. Decomposed forms (fst_pairwise / dxy / theta_pi) are tracked separately for explicit single-metric requests.
intended_use: manuscript path B: FST scans, divergence between karyotype groups, nucleotide-diversity windows
label: Population statistics — windowed FST / dxy / piN / piS (composite)

description: Window-wise pairwise FST between TWO sample sets along a coordinate scope. Decomposed slice of popstats; explicit when a request asks for FST only.
intended_use: scan a candidate / cohort for population differentiation
label: Pairwise FST in windows

description: Window-wise π over one sample set on a coordinate scope. Decomposed slice of popstats (single-group mode).
intended_use: diversity scans inside a candidate or across the genome
label: Nucleotide diversity θπ in windows

description: Window-wise absolute divergence dxy between TWO sample sets. Decomposed slice of popstats (groupwise mode).
intended_use: divergence between karyotype / population groups along the genome
label: Between-group divergence dxy in windows
Inversion candidate promoter
description: Promotes window-band signals into candidate intervals with chain evidence.

label: Karyotype auto caller
description: Calls per-sample karyotype 0/1/2 for each candidate.

label: Inversion pair incompatibility test
description: Scores observed-vs-expected joint karyotype counts for a pair of inversions on different chromosomes (manuscript LG01 x LG28 target). Emits a 3x3 distortion_summary with chi-square per cell.
